mapper.select: SELECT category_id AS categoryId, name, is_active AS isActive FROM main_category WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY category_id

SELECT recipe_code AS recipeCode, category_id AS categoryId, sub_category_code AS subCategoryCode, name, price, img_url AS imgUrl, is_active AS isActive FROM recipe WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY recipe_code,category_id, recipe_code
SELECT sub_category_code AS subCategoryCode, main_category_id AS categoryId, name FROM sub_category ORDER BY main_category_id, sub_category_code

SELECT m.material_code AS materialCode, m.material_group_id AS materialGroupId, m.material_name AS materialName, m.price AS price FROM material m JOIN category_material_group cmg USING (material_group_id) WHERE cmg.category_id = #{categoryId} AND m.material_name NOT IN ('머쉬룸', '채소믹스') ORDER BY m.material_group_id, m.material_code

SELECT material_code AS materialCode, material_group_id AS materialGroupId, material_name AS materialName, price AS price FROM material WHERE material_group_id = #{materialGroupId} ORDER BY material_code

SELECT cmg.material_group_id AS materialGroupId, mg.group_name AS groupName, mg.group_min AS groupMin, mg.group_max AS groupMax FROM category_material_group cmg JOIN material_group mg USING (material_group_id) WHERE cmg.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY cmg.material_group_id

SELECT rd.recipe_code AS recipeCode, rd.material_code AS materialCode, m.material_name AS materialName, rd.required_qty AS requiredQty FROM recipe_detail rd JOIN material m ON rd.material_code = m.material_code WHERE rd.recipe_code = #{recipeCode}

SELECT om.order_menu_id AS orderMenuId, rd.material_code AS materialCode, (m.deduct_qty * om.qty * CASE WHEN r.category_id = 2 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END ) AS deductQty FROM order_menu om JOIN recipe_detail rd ON om.recipe_code = rd.recipe_code JOIN material m ON rd.material_code = m.material_code JOIN recipe r ON om.recipe_code = r.recipe_code WHERE om.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT om.order_menu_id AS orderMenuId, oo.material_code AS materialCode, (m.deduct_qty * om.qty * CASE WHEN r.category_id = 2 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END ) AS deductQty FROM order_option oo JOIN order_menu om ON oo.order_menu_id = om.order_menu_id JOIN material m ON oo.material_code = m.material_code JOIN recipe r ON om.recipe_code = r.recipe_code WHERE om.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT DISTINCT r.recipe_code FROM recipe r JOIN recipe_detail rd ON r.recipe_code = rd.recipe_code JOIN material m ON rd.material_code = m.material_code LEFT JOIN branch_stock bs ON bs.branch_code = #{branchCode} AND bs.material_code = rd.material_code WHERE IFNULL(bs.current_qty, 0) < ( rd.required_qty * IFNULL(m.deduct_qty, 1) * CASE WHEN r.category_id = 2 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END )

SELECT m.material_code AS materialCode, m.material_group_id AS materialGroupId, m.material_name AS materialName,
IFNULL(m.deduct_qty,1) AS deductQty,
IFNULL(SUM(bs.current_qty), 0) AS currentQty,
CASE WHEN IFNULL(SUM(bs.current_qty), 0) < (1 * #{multiplier}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS unavailableYn,
CASE WHEN IFNULL(SUM(bs.current_qty), 0) < (1 * #{multiplier} * 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS addUnavailableYn
FROM material m LEFT JOIN branch_stock bs ON bs.material_code = m.material_code AND bs.branch_code = #{branchCode}
GROUP BY m.material_code, m.material_group_id, m.material_name
ORDER BY m.material_group_id, m.material_code
SELECT recipe_code AS recipeCode, material_code AS materialCode, required_qty AS deductQty FROM recipe_detail
SELECT material_code AS materialCode, SUM(current_qty) AS currentQty FROM branch_stock WHERE branch_code = #{branchCode} GROUP BY material_code
SELECT material_code AS materialCode, required_qty AS requiredQty FROM recipe_detail WHERE recipe_code = #{recipeCode}
